/usr/bin/ar qc liblemo_config.a CMakeFiles/lemo_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_var.cc.o CMakeFiles/lemo_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_center.cc.o CMakeFiles/lemo_config_obj.dir/src/config/property_loader.cc.o CMakeFiles/lemo_config_obj.dir/src/config/log_config.cc.o CMakeFiles/lemo_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_printer.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblemo_config.a
